allow: PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://ticketsystembackend.up.railway.app/api/events" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $j = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; "Total events: $\($j.total\)"; "First event eventTimezone: $\($j.events[0].eventTimezone\)"; "First event eventDate: $\($j.events[0].eventDate\)"; "First event title: $\($j.events[0].title\)" } catch { "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(@\("https://ticketsystembackend.up.railway.app/", "https://ticketsystembackend.up.railway.app/api", "https://ticketsystembackend.up.railway.app/api/events?page=1&limit=12"\) | ForEach-Object { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $_ -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; "$_ -> $\($r.StatusCode\) \($\($r.Content.Length\) bytes\)" } catch { "$_ -> ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })
